source_jobs.description:
<div class="content-intro"><p><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>Who we are:</strong></span></p>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">Strongpoint Partners is </span><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW41395917 BCX0">tech</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">-enabled retirement services platform serving small- to mid-sized businesses with integrated retirement third party administration, recordkeeping, payroll, and HR solutions. </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">Recognized as one of Inc. 5000’s Fastest Growing Private Companies in America and certified as a Great Place to Work, </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">Strongpoint</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0"> offers a </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">suite of services </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">that </span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">prioritizes accuracy, compliance, and reduction of regulatory risk for its clients, delivered by local client success teams that understand the nuances of the markets they serve. ("UBP"), Creative Retirement Systems ("CRS"), Associated Pension Consultants ("APC"), Allied Consultants, Inc. ("ACI"), American Retirement Plan Services, LLC (“ARPS”), and SMS Retirement (“SMS”). </span></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41395917 BCX0">Strongpoint Partners combines a relentless passion for service and innovation with the experience and expertise required to make retirement work for everyone.
